content:
# Saudi_Arabia

**Summary**: The geographic region of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]] located in the study area within the broader context of North Africa and Algeria.

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] research conducted in the context of Saudi Arabian geosciences.

- [[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021]] studied a carbonate sequence in Italy (not Saudi Arabia, but included for tag mapping).

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] studied microplastic contamination along the eastern coast of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023]] conducted research at King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals in Dhahran, Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] conducted the study in an arid region context relevant to conditions in Saudi Arabia.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]] Saharan Platform

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] research conducted in the context of Saudi Arabian geosciences.

- [[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021]] studied a carbonate sequence in Italy (not Saudi Arabia, but included for tag mapping).

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] studied microplastic contamination along the eastern coast of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023]] conducted research at King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals in Dhahran, Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] conducted the study in an arid region context relevant to conditions in Saudi Arabia.

## Formations Present

- [[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]] Triassic, Devonian, Ordovician

## Key Findings From This Location

- Not applicable (Location is outside Saudi Arabia). ([[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]])

- Not stated in source ([[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]])

- Located at the Costa Callese stratigraphic section. ([[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021, p. 5]])

- Saudi Arabia has a coastline of around 800 km long on the Arabian Gulf starting from Khafji and ending in Salwa Bay. ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 21]])

- Not stated in source ([[2023-suleymanli|Suleymanli, 2023]])

- The lower boundary condition was defined as free drainage, representing real conditions in Saudi Arabia where water tables are deep. ([[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024, p. 37]])
